title: Analysis & Discovery
summary: Understand the audience, the gap, and the constraints before designing anything.

title: Strategy & Curriculum
summary: Decide what kind of experience this needs to be, then shape the arc that gets there.

title: Development
summary: Build the assets: slides, video, code, copy.

title: Plan & Execution
summary: Plan the rollout, then deliver the experience to real learners.

title: Measurement & Improvement
summary: Find out whether it worked, then ship the next version sharper.

title: Project Management
summary: Keep the work moving: scope, schedule, stakeholders, and risk.
